name: 商業碾壓——財力反殺
description: Richard威脅投資三億封殺Michelle，結果發現整個片場就是Michelle的產業，他的錢根本不夠格。從經濟弱勢到碾壓式的財力展示，完美滿足了「打臉」快感。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: I will invest $300 million in this project as long as Michelle is blacklisted. ... This studio belongs to her. ... Unfortunately, Mr. Gallow, you don't have the authority to kick me out. Your measly $300 million just isn't going to cut it. And from what I understand, you're pretty deep in debt right now.
